violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Box of potatoes on floor in dry storage room.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Mop was not hung to air dry. Sitting in mop bucket in dry storage room.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
